creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=fd68e9e2b677db0444fd7dd5aeac01b0adc93209

commit fd68e9e2b677db0444fd7dd5aeac01b0adc93209
Author:     Tobias C. Berner <tcberner@FreeBSD.org>
AuthorDate: 2021-12-11 19:00:13 +0000
Commit:     Tobias C. Berner <tcberner@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2021-12-13 20:13:45 +0000

    graphics/poppler: update to 21.12

    Release 21.12.0:
        core:
             * Add API to add images
             * CairoOutputDev: Fix de-duping of Flate images
             * Fix crash on broken files when using non-default ENABLE_ZLIB_UNCOMPRESS. Issue #393
             * Minor code improvements

        glib:
             * Add API for validation of signatures
             * Add API to read/save to file descriptor

        utils:
             * pdftohtml: Reduce sensitivity of duplicate detection. Issue #1117

        build system:
             * Increase C++ standard to 17

    Exp-run by:     antoine
    PR:             260344
